since_last: 42% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.98%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.95% · Gold -0.06% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 42% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.98%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.98%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.94%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -5.83%
cards.body: Leaders: BIDU +3.60%, AVAV +3.04%, NOW +1.89%, OKTA +1.87%, GOOGL +1.85%. Laggards: SKHY -5.83%, ARM -3.62%, TSM -3.11%, AMD -2.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.31% at $135.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
